mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing units starts (HOUST) above 580,000 signals a strengthening demand for residential real estate, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with HOUST > 580,000 are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) below 98.2 signals a weakening supply chain, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with INDPRO < 98.2 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in initial unemployment claims (PAYEMS) above 130,000 signals a weakening labor market, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with PAYEMS > 130,000 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income (RSAFS) above $340 billion signals a strengthening demand for consumer goods, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods with RSAFS > $340 billion are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) above 10.5 signals a weakening labor market, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with UNRATE > 10.5 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real GDP (GDPC1) above $12.9 trillion signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, which is positively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods with GDPC1 > $12.9 trillion are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the Consumer Price Index (CPIAUCSL) above 216 signals a strengthening inflationary pressure, which is negatively correlated with S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods with CPIAUCSL > 216 are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
